falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above 5,500 in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained break above this level would contradict the pattern's bearish bias and invalidate the 'UNKNOWN' verdict by indicating a potential reversal.

falsification_conditions.condition: The 14-day average trading volume on the NASDAQ exceeds 20 billion shares
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a surge in volume would signal extreme market participation, directly conflicting with the 'HOLD' signal and blowoff score implications of low-volume consolidation.

falsification_conditions.condition: The CBOE VIX index drops below 12 for three consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a collapse in volatility expectations, contradicting the historical bottom pattern's volatility profile and invalidating the current call's risk-on assumptions.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
